tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 21516 Software_error_DS

abstract.p: The error means an unexpected situation occurred that the embedded software can not handle other than to stop immediately.
The error can have plenty of different root causes.
Usually a software reload / reinstall does NOT help.

tsCauses.p: Check error log for errors just before this error code

tsDiagnose.p: Check the Error logs in SDS for other errors just before or after the 21516 and act according these other error codes.
Escalate to PPP Venlo (including all log files).
